name: Rhode Island School of Design (RISD)
department: Fine Arts / Graphic Design / Illustration · 纯艺术 / 平面设计 / 插画
requirements: Portfolio: 12–20 works. Artist statement (500 words). 3 letters of recommendation. Transcripts. SAT/ACT optional. Portfolio must demonstrate observational drawing ability and creative range.

name: Parsons School of Design · 帕森斯设计学院
department: Fine Arts / Fashion / Illustration / Product Design · 纯艺术 / 时装 / 插画 / 产品设计
requirements: Parsons Challenge (creative project). Portfolio: 8–12 works. Personal essay. Transcripts. No standardized test required. The Parsons Challenge assesses creative thinking and problem-solving.

name: School of Visual Arts (SVA) · 视觉艺术学院
department: Fine Arts / Illustration / Photography / Animation · 纯艺术 / 插画 / 摄影 / 动画
requirements: Portfolio: 15–20 works relevant to chosen major. Personal statement. Transcripts. No entrance exam. Work should reflect individual artistic voice and technical skill.

name: Yale School of Art · 耶鲁大学艺术学院
department: MFA: Painting / Sculpture / Graphic Design / Photography · 绘画 / 雕塑 / 平面设计 / 摄影
requirements: Graduate program only. Portfolio: 20 images. Statement of purpose (500 words). 3 letters of recommendation. CV/Resume. GRE not required. Extremely competitive — acceptance rate ~3%.

name: Central Saint Martins (CSM) · 中央圣马丁艺术学院
department: Fine Art / Fashion / Graphic Communication / Product Design · 纯艺术 / 时装 / 平面传达 / 产品设计
requirements: Portfolio submitted via UAL application. Interview required for shortlisted candidates. Personal statement. English proficiency (IELTS 6.0+). Portfolio must demonstrate research process, not just final outcomes.

name: Royal College of Art (RCA) · 英国皇家艺术学院
department: MFA: Painting / Sculpture / Photography / Animation · 绘画 / 雕塑 / 摄影 / 动画
requirements: Graduate program. Portfolio: 20 works + process documentation. Personal statement (600 words). 2 academic references. IELTS 6.5+. Shortlisted candidates attend an interview day in London.

name: Goldsmiths, University of London · 伦敦大学金史密斯学院
department: Fine Art / Illustration / Design / Art Practice · 纯艺术 / 插画 / 设计 / 艺术实践
requirements: Portfolio review. Personal statement. Interview (online or in-person). IELTS 6.5+. Known for conceptual and critical art practice. Portfolio should reflect independent thinking over technical polish.

name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Roma · 罗马美术学院
department: Pittura / Scultura / Arte e Nuove Tecnologie · 绘画 / 雕塑 / 艺术与新技术
requirements: Entrance exam (esame di ammissione) held in September. Portfolio presentation. Italian language proficiency (B1 recommended). Diploma superiore required. EU and non-EU application procedures differ.

name: Accademia di Belle Arti di Brera · 米兰布雷拉美术学院
department: Pittura / Scultura / Nuovi Linguaggi · 绘画 / 雕塑 / 新媒体语言
requirements: Entrance exam in July–September. Portfolio (physical or digital). Italian proficiency required. One of Italy's most prestigious fine art academies. High international student enrollment.

name: École des Beaux-Arts de Paris (ENSBA) · 巴黎国立高等美术学院
department: Fine Arts / Printmaking / Sculpture / Drawing · 纯艺术 / 版画 / 雕塑 / 素描
requirements: Competitive entrance exam (concours). Portfolio submission. Jury interview. French language required. One of the oldest and most selective fine art schools in Europe. ~80 places per year.

name: Gerrit Rietveld Academie · 里特维尔德艺术学院
department: Fine Art / Ceramics / Graphic Design · 纯艺术 / 陶瓷 / 平面设计
requirements: Portfolio submitted online. Entrance assignment (project brief responded to). Interview. English proficiency. Amsterdam-based; strong tradition of experimental and autonomous art practice.

name: Aalto University School of Arts · 阿尔托大学艺术学院
department: Fine Arts / Fashion / Film / Interior Architecture · 纯艺术 / 时装 / 电影 / 室内建筑
requirements: Online portfolio. Entrance task. Two-stage selection. English or Finnish. Strong emphasis on interdisciplinary work and research-based practice. Highly competitive internationally.

name: Kunstakademie Düsseldorf · 杜塞尔多夫艺术学院
department: Fine Arts / Painting / Sculpture / Media Art · 纯艺术 / 绘画 / 雕塑 / 媒体艺术
requirements: Portfolio (Mappe) submitted in person or by post. Selection day held annually. German language helpful but not strictly required. One of Europe's most prestigious fine art schools; tuition-free.

name: 中央美术学院 (CAFA)
department: 油画 / 版画 / 雕塑 / 实验艺术 / 设计 · Oil Painting / Printmaking / Experimental Art
requirements: 全国联考 + 校考。素描、色彩、速写三科考试。文化课成绩要求。国际生单独报名通道，需提交作品集和个人陈述。中国最高水平美术院校。

name: 中国美术学院 (CAA)
department: 国画 / 油画 / 雕塑 / 跨媒体艺术 / 设计 · Chinese Painting / Intermedia Art / Design
requirements: 校考 + 联考。专业科目笔试与面试。文化课高考成绩。以传统功底与当代创作并重著称。国际生需提交作品集，联系国际合作办公室。

name: Tokyo University of the Arts · 东京艺术大学
department: Oil Painting / Sculpture / Printmaking / Intermedia Art · 油画 / 雕塑 / 版画 / 先端艺术
requirements: Entrance exam held in February (practical + written). Japanese proficiency essential. Portfolio not required in advance but presented during exam. Japan's most selective national art university.

name: RMIT University — School of Art · 皇家墨尔本理工大学艺术学院
department: Fine Art / Photography / Painting / Ceramics · 纯艺术 / 摄影 / 绘画 / 陶瓷
requirements: Portfolio (10–15 works). Personal statement. Academic transcripts. English proficiency (IELTS 6.5+). RMIT is Melbourne-based; strong focus on contemporary practice and community engagement.

name: HEAD Geneva · 日内瓦艺术与设计大学
department: Fine Arts / Illustration / Graphic Design · 纯艺术 / 插画 / 平面设计
requirements: Portfolio review online. Entrance test. Interview in French or English. French fluency strongly preferred. Located in Geneva; internationally diverse student body.

name: Pratt Institute · 普瑞特艺术学院
department: Fine Arts / Photography / Digital Arts / Industrial Design · 纯艺术 / 摄影 / 数字艺术 / 工业设计
requirements: Portfolio: 10–20 works. Artist statement. Transcripts. Letters of recommendation (2). SAT/ACT optional. Strong foundation program; known for technical rigor and creative breadth.

name: California Institute of the Arts (CalArts) · 加州艺术学院
department: Fine Arts / Animation / Film / Character Animation · 纯艺术 / 动画 / 电影 / 角色动画
requirements: Portfolio tailored per program (Animation requires specific demo reel format). Artist statement. Transcripts. 2 recommendations. Known for experimental and avant-garde practice. Strong alumni network in film and animation.
